skill.name: seo-analysis
skill.description: SEO analysis and optimization specialist for technical audits, meta tag improvements, Core Web Vitals review, and search visibility recommendations.
skill.summary: Analyze SEO issues and produce practical optimization recommendations.
skill.author: Joseph OBrien

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported external command, network, and weak cryptography patterns in SKILL.md. Review found these are Markdown examples, an example.com URL, and ordinary SEO text, with no executable code, network behavior, cryptographic code, or prompt injection evidence.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Fences Flagged as External Commands
low_findings.description: The flagged backticks are Markdown code fences and sample prompts or output blocks. They do not execute Ruby, shell, or any external command.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The exact locations contain Markdown fences or example boundaries in documentation. No command interpreter, subprocess call, or user-controlled execution path is present.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Example URL Flagged as Network Behavior
low_findings.description: The hardcoded URL is an example Open Graph image value using example.com. It is documentation text and does not trigger an outbound request.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The URL appears inside an HTML meta tag example. There is no fetch, curl, browser automation, or other network execution mechanism in the skill.

low_findings.title: False Positive: SEO Text Flagged as Weak Cryptography
low_findings.description: The flagged lines describe SEO tasks, meta descriptions, and example page metadata. No weak cryptographic algorithm or cryptographic implementation appears in these locations.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed lines are descriptive SEO documentation and sample metadata. No MD5, SHA-1, DES, RC4, or comparable weak cryptographic use is present.

content.user_title: Improve SEO Audits with AI Guidance
content.value_statement: SEO audits can miss technical problems, weak metadata, and performance issues. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through structured SEO reviews with actionable recommendations.
actual_capabilities: Reviews technical SEO topics such as crawlability, redirects, canonical tags, HTTPS, and mobile usability.
Suggests title tags, meta descriptions, Open Graph tags, and Twitter Card improvements.
Explains Core Web Vitals targets for LCP, FID, and CLS with improvement ideas.
Provides structured recommendations for schema markup and internal linking.
Organizes SEO audit findings into current state, optimized changes, and expected impact.
limitations: Does not run live crawls, Lighthouse tests, or Search Console queries by itself.
Requires page content, URLs, metrics, or crawl exports from the user for specific analysis.
Cannot guarantee ranking changes because search results depend on many external factors.
Does not replace legal, accessibility, or paid search review.

use_cases.title: Audit a Website Before Launch
use_cases.description: Check metadata, crawlability, structured data, and mobile readiness before publishing a new site.

use_cases.title: Prioritize Technical SEO Fixes
use_cases.description: Turn crawl notes and performance metrics into a practical list of engineering tasks.

use_cases.title: Improve Existing Search Snippets
use_cases.description: Rewrite titles, descriptions, and social metadata for important pages.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Page Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this page for basic SEO issues. Focus on title, meta description, headings, links, and mobile concerns. Provide clear fixes.

prompt_templates.title: Technical Audit Checklist
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a technical SEO audit for this site information. Cover crawlability, indexing, canonical tags, redirects, HTTPS, sitemap, robots.txt, and mobile usability.

prompt_templates.title: Core Web Vitals Plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze these Core Web Vitals metrics and page details. Explain likely causes, priority fixes, and expected SEO impact.

prompt_templates.title: Advanced SEO Roadmap
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a 30-day SEO roadmap from this crawl export, page list, keywords, and performance data. Separate engineering, content, and analytics tasks.

output_examples.input: Review a homepage with a generic title, missing meta description, and no social metadata.
output_examples.output: A concise audit that flags missing metadata, proposes a clearer search title, adds a persuasive description, and recommends social sharing tags.

output_examples.input: Analyze Core Web Vitals where LCP is slow and CLS is above target.
output_examples.output: A prioritized action plan covering image optimization, render-blocking resources, layout stability, measurement steps, and expected user impact.

output_examples.input: Create SEO recommendations for a site with weak internal linking and unclear URL hierarchy.
output_examples.output: A site structure review with link placement ideas, anchor text guidance, sitemap checks, and priority pages for stronger internal links.

best_practices: Provide page URLs, current metadata, target keywords, and performance metrics for precise recommendations.
Ask for prioritized findings when engineering time or content resources are limited.
Validate recommendations with crawl tools, analytics, and Search Console before major changes.
anti_patterns: Do not request guaranteed ranking improvements from metadata changes alone.
Do not optimize only for keywords while ignoring search intent and page quality.
Do not apply technical recommendations without checking platform constraints and redirects.

faq.question: Can this skill run a live SEO crawl?
faq.answer: No. It analyzes information you provide and produces recommendations. Use a crawler or analytics tool for live measurements.

faq.question: Does it work with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill is marked as compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: What information should I provide?
faq.answer: Provide URLs, page copy, current metadata, crawl exports, Core Web Vitals metrics, and target keywords when available.

faq.question: Can it write new meta tags?
faq.answer: Yes. It can suggest titles, descriptions, Open Graph tags, and Twitter Card text based on page goals.

faq.question: Will it guarantee higher rankings?
faq.answer: No. It provides SEO recommendations, but rankings depend on search intent, competition, content quality, links, and search engine changes.

faq.question: Is it useful for developers?
faq.answer: Yes. It can convert audit observations into technical tasks for performance, crawlability, redirects, metadata, and structured data.
